title: athyrium × undulatipinnulum
intro: Athyrium × undulatipinnulum, also known as the Fern-leaf Lady Fern, is a hybrid plant species in the Athyrium genus, characterized by its unique, deeply lobed fronds with wavy edges. Traditionally, the leaves of the Fern-leaf Lady Fern have been used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to their medicinal properties. The health benefits of Athyrium × undulatipinnulum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce swelling and protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often dried and used as a tea or added to infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
